subcodes.first_line: O Ba Qabl-i-Qáf! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. In these days the Sun of Utterance shineth resplendent before the countenance of all religions and reigneth supreme [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا با قبل قاف علیک بهآئی و عنایتی این ایام آفتاب بیان امام وجوه ادیان مشرق و مالک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
